calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erica Madero in Propria Persona.
Christopher Quarterman in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the parties have proof of fact of marriage. Mr. Quarterman stated that they want to make sure their marriage is registered in the United States in case there are any bureaucratic issues and that he hasn't had any issues. Ms. Madero stated that they have not had to provide proof of marriage, but they want it in English just in case. The Court noted that there is a translation of the marriage certificate and that this procedure is used when there is no proof, or when someone says it is insufficient. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
